titles.title: Let My Life Be A Picture of You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord of light create in me A reflection of yourself So that you can freely work And truly shine through me Shine through me

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines:
Holy Spirit grant in me A reflection of yourself Take me from faith to charity The stature of a perfect man
Christ in me

verse.name: v4
